name: Elder Faerie Cookie
description:
Elder Faerie Cookie is a moderately tall Cookie with a slim build, somewhat elderly periwinkle eyes and pointed eyebrows, and dark magenta dough. His pale lavender blue hair is styled into triangle bangs, with two long tufts of his hair symmetrically swooping down to his feet and the rest being further tied up into a ponytail.

Elder Faerie Cookie's armor reflects his now-rescinded status as the fabled Guardian of the Silver Tree and its Seal: his dark slate gray and light blue gray armor is adorned with a metallic light cadet gray finish. The shoulder pads glimmer with sheens of turquoise and light violet while what seems to resemble (or at least mimic) a slate rerebrace finds itself laying between the shoulder pads and his right elbow as the chestplate extends to the base of the middle of his head. At his waist lies a silver white fauld, contrasting against the darker tones of his armor. Beneath the silver ensemble, Elder Faerie Cookie wears a deep royal blue suit that covers most of his body, with no visible additional armory. Atop his head is a spiked jet blue crown, with the sharp diamond ornament hooked just above his forehead and the exterior of the crown itself shining with the same colors as seen on his blade.

The Guardian's large silver gladius sword, of which he can summon at will, sports a white spiked hilt, butterfly wing-shaped grip, and rain-guard. The Guardian's signature colors shine all throughout the blade as they halt to the near-middle, meeting at the edge of the white star embellishment and a ray of all white following straight down to the sword's point.

Befitting his ancient, monarchical nature of the Faerie King, he has a pair of iridescent, shimmering light gray blue butterfly-esque wings on his back, rendered in hues of turquoise, blue and purple. The Guardian's wings are often featured closed—with some exceptions being his angry sprite and various overworld animations—thus forming a shape reminiscent to a large cape. 4 floating translucent leaves follow behind him, supposedly serving no functional purpose. He never spreads his wings without need.
creator: pintobeansoup26
